title: Unidentified clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the first squad of clone commandos killed in the [[Mission to Ord Mantell (Clone Wars)|mission to Ord Mantell]]|[[Sarge's clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|the squad led by Sarge]]}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
{{Organization

'''A [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]]''' was an elite [[Special forces/Legends|special forces]] unit within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] that operated during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Comprised of four [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], the [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] took part in a [[Mission to Ord Mantell (Clone Wars)|mission]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] where they were to recover a [[The Package|diplomatic package]] that had been bound for [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] from a gang of [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] who had stolen it with the intent to sell the item to the Confederacy. During the course of the mission, one of the squad's [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] was [[Blaster/Legends|shot]] and [[Death/Legends|killed]] by one of the Trandoshans, while the other three fell in an explosion when attacked with a number of [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]]. Their fellow commandos in [[Sarge's clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|another squad]] were able to complete the mission and recover the package, but they too suffered heavy casualties in doing so.

==History==
{{Quote|Last night, Trandoshan bounty hunters intercepted a package of ''extreme diplomatic'' importance, intended for ''Supreme Chancellor Palpatine''. They intend to sell it to the Separatists. You are going to make sure that situation does not occur.|[[Unidentified Advanced Recon Commando (intelligence officer)|ARC trooper officer]]|<ref name="Package" />}}
[[File:Sarge_briefing.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Both squads being briefed for the mission to Ord Mantell.]]
The four members of the squad were [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] of [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], born on the [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]],<ref name="CloneTrooper">{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}}</ref> located in the remote [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> Trained as [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] and deployed in opposition to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] as part of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] following the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]],<ref name="Package" /> the squad served as part of the Grand [[Army/Legends|Army's]] [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]] with their [[Commando/Legends|commando]] comrades,<ref name="GttGAR" /> and operated out of [[Arca Company Barracks]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="TZ" /> Six [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], the squad's [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] were summoned to the headquarters of [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]], along with the commandos of [[Sarge's clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|another squad]]. There, they were briefed by an [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] [[Unidentified Advanced Recon Commando (intelligence officer)|intelligence officer]] who informed the squad that a [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] [[The Package|package]] from [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] intended to be delivered to [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], had in fact been stolen by a group of [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]. The [[Color/Legends|yellow]]-marked ARC [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] tasked the squad with traveling to the planet [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], where the bounty hunters intended to sell the package to the Confederacy, and [[Mission to Ord Mantell (Clone Wars)|recover the package]] from the Trandoshans.<ref name="Package" />

[[File:BlueSquadAssault.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The squad's commandos unsuccessfully attack a speeder of Trandoshan bounty hunters.]]
On Ord Mantell, the squad enacted a plan to hold the bounty hunters up in the midday traffic, while the other squad took position on a nearby roof. Disguised as a civilian with a tattered [[brown]] cloak, one of the squad's commandos blocked the road with a large [[Groundcar/Legends|truck]], pretending to be attending to its maintenance. When the three-[[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] convoy [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by the Trandoshans arrived, the rooftop squad's ordnance specialist opened fire with a [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launcher]] that destroyed the foremost [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] belonging to the bounty hunters. Seeing his moment, the disguised commando attacked, but was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by one of the Trandoshans almost immediately. Now aware that they had fallen into a trap, the bounty hunters attempted to flee, but the remaining members of the squad on the road assaulted the closest speeder. Desperate, the bounty hunters ran down the clone soldiers with their speeder, before one of his associates threw a number of [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]] from the rear of the vehicle. The [[Grenade/Legends|grenades]] exploded, killing the last of the squad's [[Troop/Legends|troops]]. The commandos would be avenged, however, by the efforts of their fellow squad, and its [[Sarge (clone commando)|leader]]. Although they, too, suffered severe casualties in pursuit of the Trandoshan [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]], the squad leader killed the last of the bounty hunters and recovered the stolen package for return to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="Package" />

==Equipment==
The commandos of the squad were armed with [[DC-17m Interchangeable Weapon System/Legends|DC-17m]] [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]],<ref name="Package" /> the standard issue weapon of clone commandos in the Republic's Grand [[Army/Legends|Army]]. Also, like all clone commandos,<ref name="TZ" /> The squad's members were equipped with [[Katarn-class commando armor/Legends|''Katarn''-class commando armor]]. Unlike their comrades on Ord Mantell, who each chose a unique paint scheme with which to decorate their individual [[Armor/Legends|armor]], the squad's soldiers emblazoned their armor suits in a uniform [[blue]] [[Color/Legends|coloring]] with [[white]] markings,<ref name="Package" /> more in line with the matte-[[black]] armor shared by the commandos of [[Omega Squad]], or [[Yayax Squad]]'s dazzle camouflage.<ref name="Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel">''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
In [[2005]], the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 3|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume'' 3]] of the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Clone Wars Adventures'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comics]] introduced two squads of Republic commandos with the story ''[[The Package (comic story)|The Package]]''.<ref name="Package" />

==Appearances==
*{{CWACite|3|The Package (comic story)}} {{1st}}
